summary: Tested course restructure features for multi-university system. Fixed critical bug in enrollments.py where JWT auth was used instead of session-based auth. All 21 backend API tests pass. Admin frontend pages verified working (Universidades, Courses with filters, Settings with Tu Universidad toggle).
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: enrollments.py was using JWT token decoding but frontend sends session tokens - changed to session-based auth matching auth.py pattern
seed_data_creation: Created test user with session token for enrollment testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Course restructure APIs are fully functional. The enrollments endpoint now uses session-based auth (same as auth routes). Student-facing pages (Biblioteca, MisCursos, Simulacros) require Google OAuth authentication to test - admin pages can be tested with username/password login.

library_universities_api.POST /api/admin/library-universities: PASS - Creates university with name, short_name

enrollments_api.POST /api/enrollments: PASS - Enrolls in course (with trial limit)

courses_with_filters.GET /api/courses?university_id=...&searc: PASS - Filters by university and search

import_chapters_api.POST /api/admin/courses/{id}/import-chap: PASS - Imports chapters with lessons and questions

admin_frontend.Admin Library Universities page: PASS - Nueva Universidad button, CRUD working
admin_frontend.Admin Courses page: PASS - Search and university filter present

bugs_fixed.issue: CRITICAL: Enrollments API returning 401 for valid session tokens
bugs_fixed.root_cause: get_current_user() was using JWT decoding (jwt.decode) but frontend sends session tokens stored in database
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to session-based auth: lookup session_token in user_sessions collection, validate expiry, get user by user_id from session

bugs_fixed.issue: TypeError comparing offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes
bugs_fixed.root_cause: expires_at from MongoDB could be naive datetime
bugs_fixed.fix: Added timezone awareness check: if expires_at.tzinfo is None, replace with UTC
